result.stdout:
missing required parameter [source]

Usage: btrfs-rsync FLAGS source target

Synchronize btrfs SOURCE filesystem with given TARGET.

Optional flags:
  -u,--dry-run            list sync actions without apply (simulation mode)
  -n,--skip-snap-resync   avoid resync existing subvolume snapshots
  -s,--skip-del-subvol    avoid to remove destination subvol not present in source

Global flags:
  -h,--help               show usage

Parameters
  source                  source path
  target                  target path
